profile.name: Elena Krayneva
profile.headline: Turning Marketing Data into Strategic Decisions
profile.subheadline: MSc Digital Marketing & Analytics student with hands-on experience in **data analysis**, **KPI reporting**, and **marketing strategy**. Combining structured analytical thinking with a strong business understanding to turn data into actionable insights.

experience.companyDescription: One of Russia's largest retail technology companies, developing digital products for the X5 Retail Group ecosystem.
bullets: Analyzed workforce datasets covering headcount, onboarding, attrition, and leave across business units
Developed recurring KPI dashboards to support workforce planning and senior management decisions
Prepared data-driven reports for talent reviews and succession planning committees
Identified patterns in attrition and engagement metrics and formulated improvement recommendations

experience.companyDescription: A legal-tech and compliance consulting firm providing outsourced legal and procurement operations to enterprise clients.
bullets: Developed structured Excel trackers to monitor contract approval workflows across 40+ contractors monthly
Coordinated cross-functional workflows between legal, finance, and project delivery teams
Proposed and documented process improvements that reduced approval cycle time by 20%
Built structured reporting templates used by operations leads for weekly reviews

experience.companyDescription: IE Business School is one of Europe's top-ranked business schools, based in Madrid. MSc Digital Marketing & Analytics program.
bullets: Completed 3 real-world client consulting engagements through the MSc program
Applied marketing analytics frameworks including funnel analysis, persona mapping, and KPI design
Delivered strategic recommendations for market positioning, growth, and digital marketing to real clients
Conducted customer research (16 in-depth interviews) and translated insights into structured strategy documents
